exercises.name: body weight Crunch
instructions: Set up for the body weight Crunch using body weight.
Maintain proper posture throughout the movement.
Move through a controlled range of motion.
Pause briefly at the hardest portion of the lift.
Return to the starting position under control.
exercises.description: body weight Crunch is a widely used body weight-based exercise that primarily targets the abs. It is commonly included in strength and hypertrophy programs.
